TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Bujar_Nishani, title = Bujar_Nishani, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bujar_Nishani} }

S.FORM: == Bujar Nishani == ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 9, Bujar Nishani, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1966 mrhuw Albania ta' misuw hya' ga Bujar Nishani, aring ryax tay 24 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. Qnxan nya Bujar Nishani htagan beh sa Albania,Durrës. Bujar Nishani sa kawas 1991, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. Pinqbaqan nya Bujar Nishani, kawas tay 2004 tmasoq mqwas biru sa Naval Postgraduate hopa pqwasan biru of Tirana. 1988 kawas hiya ga tmasoq Skanderbeg hopa pqwasan biru. Snhyan s'agan mrhuw cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

== Bujar Nishani == ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 9, Bujar Nishani, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1966 mrhuw Albania ta' misuw hya' ga Bujar Nishani, aring ryax tay 24 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. Qnxan nya Bujar Nishani htagan beh sa Albania,Durrës. Bujar Nishani sa kawas 1991, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. Pinqbaqan nya Bujar Nishani, kawas tay 2004 tmasoq mqwas biru sa Naval Postgraduate hopa pqwasan biru of Tirana. 1988 kawas hiya ga tmasoq Skanderbeg hopa pqwasan biru. Snhyan s'agan mrhuw cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == βujar nis~ɕħani == rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, βujar nis~ɕħani, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj **** mrħuw alβania taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa βujar nis~ɕħani, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qnxan nja βujar nis~ɕħani ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa alβania,*urr*s~ɕ. βujar nis~ɕħani s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~ɕezi. pinqβaqan nja βujar nis~ɕħani, kawas~ɕ taj **** tmas~ɕoq mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa na*al pos~ɕtɣra*uate ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru o* tirana. **** kawas~ɕ ħija ɣa tmas~ɕoq s~ɕkan*erβeɣ ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru. s~ɕnħjan s~ɕʔaɣan mrħuw ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
